original_query: select min(i_brand_id), min(i_manufact_id),  	min(ss_ext_sales_price)  from date_dim, store_sales, item,customer,customer_address,store  where d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk    and ss_item_sk = i_item_sk    and ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk    and c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk    and ss_store_sk = s_store_sk    AND i_category  = 'Sports'    and d_year=1999    and d_moy = 3    and substring(ca_zip,1,5) <> substring(s_zip,1,5)    and ca_state  = 'VA'    and c_birth_month = 10    and ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 43  ;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_customers AS (
    SELECT c_customer_sk, c_current_addr_sk
    FROM customer
    WHERE c_birth_month = 10
),
filtered_addresses AS (
    SELECT ca_address_sk, ca_zip
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state = 'VA'
),
filtered_dates AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 1999 AND d_moy = 3
),
filtered_items AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk, i_brand_id, i_manufact_id
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category = 'Sports'
)
SELECT 
    MIN(i.i_brand_id), 
    MIN(i.i_manufact_id), 
    MIN(ss.ss_ext_sales_price)
FROM 
    filtered_addresses ca
    JOIN filtered_customers c ON ca.ca_address_sk = c.c_current_addr_sk
    JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN filtered_dates d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    JOIN filtered_items i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
WHERE 
    LEFT(ca.ca_zip, 5) <> LEFT(s.s_zip, 5)
    AND ss.ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 43;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Reorder joins to filter customers and addresses early, starting with smaller filtered tables to reduce the dataset before joining with larger tables like store_sales.
Replace substring(ca_zip,1,5) with LEFT(ca_zip,5) for better readability while maintaining equivalent functionality.
